source_note: PostgreSQL export filtered to URA-owned LandCare parcels across all available months. Assignments updated through 2026-06-15; survey completion shown through 2026-05-15.
owner_match_note: Owner names are normalized before matching URA and Pittsburgh Land Bank variants.

source_contract.current_universe: ArcGIS gisdb_gis_epp_parcels_full FeatureServer filtered to URA Owned LandCare records.
source_contract.historical_assignments: PostgreSQL export from gis.regrid_bundle_assignments joined to survey submissions and parcel ownership tables.
source_contract.budget_expenses: Finance dashboard metrics are built separately from the LandCare budgeting workbook and published as finance_summary.json.
